title: Patching Array
hints: Focus on the range of sums [1, current_max] you can already form. How does adding a new number expand this range?
This is a greedy problem. Always pick the smallest number that extends your reachable range as much as possible.
If you can form [1, x], adding x+1 lets you reach [1, 2x+1]. Use this to decide when to patch.
